meta.title: Zone Lab — Building software that helps you level up
meta.description: AI-augmented product studio based in Taiwan. We build software for self-improvement.

hero.heading: Building software that helps you level up.
hero.subtitle: AI-augmented product studio based in Taiwan.

vision.heading: Software with purpose.
vision.subtitle: Every product we build revolves around one question: how does this help the user grow?
vision.card1Text: We believe technology should make people better, not distracted. Every product revolves around one core question: "How does this help the user grow?"
vision.card2Text: We're a lean team where every member is an expert. Less is more — focus on doing the right things, not doing many things.
vision.card3Text: We don't make 5-year plans. We ship fast, collect feedback, and keep improving. Our products are always in beta, because we're always evolving.

products.heading: What we're building.
products.subtitle: Real products, real impact. From concept to App Store.
products.marawannaDesc: Your personal marathon coach, powered by data.

team.heading: Meet the team.
team.subtitle: Lean, cross-functional, high-execution. Every member focuses on their domain, building meaningful products together.

jason.quote: I decide, I own it, I experiment.
jason.bio: Founder of Zone Lab. Believes lean teams + efficient collaboration is the future of work. No pitch decks — just ship products.

northstar.quote: I don't just report the market — I tell you what we should do.
northstar.bio: Responsible for market signals and product direction. Opinionated and unafraid of controversy. If I say "this is the next opportunity," it is.

houdini.quote: I turn specs into things that work.
houdini.bio: Handles product development from frontend to backend. Loves clean architecture and elegant solutions. If it can be done in 10 lines, never write 100.

watchdog.quote: I make sure things don't blow up.
watchdog.bio: Manages infrastructure, deployment, and monitoring. You don't see my work because when I do it well, nothing happens.

vampire.bio: Handles product analytics and user behavior insights. Numbers don't lie, but they can be misread. My job is to find the signals that matter.

echo.quote: I hear what users say — and what they don't.
echo.bio: Collects user feedback and provides support. Every complaint hides a product improvement opportunity. My job is to not let those signals disappear.

thomas.quote: I track progress so you can focus on the work.
thomas.bio: Handles operational tracking and weekly reports. I don't rush people, but I make sure nothing gets forgotten.

godin.bio: Handles marketing content and external communications. Great products need great stories. My job is to make people remember why we exist.

footer.tagline: Building software that helps you level up.
